item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Deck Cadet position is available on a Chemical Tanker vessel. The contract duration is 2-3 months with a monthly salary of 450 €. This is an entry-level role for aspiring maritime professionals.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deck Cadet Job - Chemical Tanker at L-STREAM.COM.UA

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Engine Cadet position is open for individuals seeking to start their career in the engine department at sea.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Cadet Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Deck Cadet position is available for aspiring officers to gain practical experience at sea.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deck Cadet Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A maritime company is seeking applications for Cadet positions. Applicants should download the Cadet Application & Interview Form and submit it via email. Specifics on vessel type, contract duration, and joining dates are not mentioned in this announcement.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cadet Application at Avin International S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Opportunity for a Deck Cadet to begin a career at sea. This entry-level position offers training and experience in deck operations. Details regarding the program will be shared with applicants.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deck Cadet Vacancy at Arcadia Shipmanagement Company Limited

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Engine Cadet position is available for individuals aspiring to a career in marine engineering. This role provides essential training and practical experience in the engine department. Further details will be provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Cadet Vacancy at Arcadia Shipmanagement Company Limited

item.description:
Location: Emden
Description:

A maritime company is seeking motivated individuals for its cadet training program. This opportunity is ideal for those who love languages, seek international work environments, and are flexible, team-oriented, and eager for challenges. The program offers long-term career prospects and the possibility of international experience at sea.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cadet Training Program at Sunship Schiffahrtskontor KG

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An apprenticeship as a maritime business administrator is available for the 2026 training year. The program offers a comprehensive insight into various daily work areas of a shipping company, including chartering and nautical-technical inspection. Applicants should have an interest in shipping, a good secondary school leaving certificate or Abitur, commercial understanding, good English and German skills, and proficiency with MS Office. Teamwork is essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Business Administrator Apprenticeship at HS Bereederungs GmbH & Company KG

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Apprenticeship positions for Ship Administrator (Tramp) are available within the tanker fleet. This role offers a chance to develop skills in a collaborative international setting that emphasizes teamwork and individual growth. Future career opportunities may arise.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Apprenticeship - Ship Administrator at German Tanker Shipping GmbH & Company KG

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Apprenticeship positions for Ship Mechanic are offered within the tanker fleet. This is an opportunity to gain practical experience in a supportive international environment that values individual development and teamwork. Potential for future career progression is available.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Apprenticeship - Ship Mechanic at German Tanker Shipping GmbH & Company KG
